appScores.topIssue: Uses old sticky-header+cc-topbar pattern instead of cc-app-nav; My Apps grid cards lack hover micro-interactions
No cc-fade-in/cc-stagger animations; uses old cc-topbar+cc-nav; dense inline styles; no empty states
No shared animation components; no interaction feedback; no cc-app-nav; missing empty state handling
Floating docs link instead of cc-app-nav; old sticky-header pattern
Good reference app; minor spacing tweaks possible
Uses old sticky-header+floating docs link instead of cc-app-nav
Old nav pattern; no card-based layout; missing type badges and filter UX; no hover states on media items
Has cc-app-nav; good card/timeline views; could use cc-stagger on card grid
No fleet overview stats; no kind badges; no animations; no sql-sync for live updates; card structure could be more informative
Uses cc-app-nav correctly — clean
100% inline styles; no animations; no fleet summary; basic card layout without structured metrics; no alert severity levels
Massive inline styles throughout; table-heavy layout for stale drafts; no animations; select dropdowns instead of filter pills; no visual content type breakdown
Old nav pattern; lots of inline styles but well-structured
Custom app-nav instead of cc-app-nav; otherwise very polished
Reuses cc-leads component with no unique identity; no pipeline stages; no stats
Well-built; could benefit from cc-stagger on site cards
Old nav; floating docs link; otherwise solid card design
Old nav; no health metrics summary; items lack priority visual cues
Unique design — very polished; mobile nav could be tighter
Good chart integration; old nav pattern
Clean gallery/viewer pattern; uses old nav
Great card design with preview animations; solid
Has cc-app-nav now; well-designed card grid
Good quiz interaction design; solid progress indicators
No index.html — app is incomplete; only has ideas.html and db.js
Simple and effective; good use of animation

variations.description: Refreshed dashboard with cc-app-nav, improved My Apps grid with gradient accent borders, staggered card reveals, better whitespace rhythm, and a status summary bar
variations.implementationPrompt: Update command-center/index.html: Replace sticky-header+cc-topbar+cc-nav with cc-app-nav. Add 2px gradient left-border to My Apps cards. Add cc-stagger with delay=80 on the grid. Add a status summary row above tabs.

variations.description: Modernized standup with cc-app-nav, cc-fade-in on header, cc-stagger on day cards, hover elevation, improved source group styling, and empty state
variations.implementationPrompt: Update standup/index.html: Replace cc-topbar+cc-nav with cc-app-nav. Wrap header in cc-fade-in. Wrap day-cards in cc-stagger. Add hover transform. Add cc-empty-state.

variations.description: Refreshed accounts with cc-app-nav, animated card entrance, improved client selector with search, better section card spacing, and hover micro-interactions
variations.implementationPrompt: Update accounts/index.html: Replace cc-topbar+cc-nav with cc-app-nav. Add cc-fade-in on client-selector. Wrap grid in cc-stagger. Add hover border-color transition.

variations.description: Complete redesign: pipeline-stage grouping, stats summary bar, avatar initials, temperature tags, hover slide-right
variations.implementationPrompt: Rebuild sales/index.html with its own identity. Replace nav with cc-app-nav. Add stats bar. Group by pipeline stage. Each lead card gets avatar initials and temperature tag.

variations.description: Card-based grid with type badges, filter pills, hover elevation with accent box-shadow, tag pills, staggered entrance
variations.implementationPrompt: Rebuild cc-gallery/index.html: Replace old nav with cc-app-nav. Add hero + filter pills. Replace gallery with card-based layout. Wrap in cc-stagger.

variations.description: Health metrics bar, client sections as rounded cards with stat badges, priority color bars on items, hover slide-right
variations.implementationPrompt: Update sprint-planning/index.html: Replace old nav with cc-app-nav. Add sprint health summary. Wrap client sections in rounded cards. Add priority color bars.

variations.description: Card-based stale drafts (replacing table), horizontal bar chart for content types, sparkline velocity, filter pills instead of dropdowns, staggered animations throughout
variations.implementationPrompt: Rebuild cc-contentful: Remove all inline styles. Replace stale drafts table with card grid with border-left accents. Replace content type table with horizontal bar chart. Add sparkline to velocity. Use filter pills. Wrap in cc-stagger/cc-fade-in.

variations.description: Fleet summary bar (total/healthy/warning/critical), gradient avatar cards with structured metric grid, color-coded alert pills, expandable repo details, staggered entrance
variations.implementationPrompt: Rebuild cc-client-health: Remove all inline styles. Add fleet summary row. Restructure cards with gradient avatars, 4-col metric grid, alert pills (warn/danger/info). Add expandable repo section. Wrap in cc-stagger.

variations.description: Fleet overview stats (total/active/completed/failed/cost), kind badges (main/cron/sub-agent), live pulse dots on active sessions, structured stat grid per card, filter pills
variations.implementationPrompt: Rebuild cc-agents: Remove inline styles. Add fleet overview row with computed stats. Add kind badges with distinct colors. Restructure cards: icon, name, kind, task (2-line clamp), 3-col stats, footer with status dot. Active sessions get pulse animation. Add sql-sync. Wrap in cc-stagger.
